title: Elementary Uygur
catalogDescription: Emphasizes the four basic language skills: listening, speaking, reading, and writing in Uygur. Focuses on exchanging real-life information in the context of the native-speaking environment and understanding Uygur language through the cultural contexts. Third in a sequence of three. Maximum 15 credits allowed between UYGUR 101; UYGUR 102; UYGUR 103; and UYGUR 105. Prerequisite: UYGUR 102.

title: Intermediate Uygur
catalogDescription: Designed to strengthen and develop further skills in listening, speaking, reading and writing and to deepen an understanding of the cultural context of Uygur. Emphasis on the expansion and refinement of linguistic and communicative skills learned in elementary Uygur. First in a sequence of three. Prerequisite: either UYGUR 103 or UYGUR 105.
